Footnotes
1The term ‘permanent shutdown’, as used in this publication, means that the facility has ceased operation and operation will not be recommenced.
2INTERNATIONAL ATOMIC ENERGY AGENCY, Decommissioning of Facilities Using Radioactive Material, IAEA Safety Standards Series No. WS-R-5, IAEA, Vienna (2006).
3The final decommissioning plan is that version of the decommissioning plan submitted for approval to the regulatory body prior to implementation of the plan. During implementation of this final plan, revisions or amendments may subsequently be needed as the activity progresses.
